About Risi

Built on Purpose.
Driven by People.

Risi Incorporated Pvt. Ltd. is a multi-sector company committed to delivering excellence in construction, infrastructure, technology trade, and emerging technologies across Nepal and the Asia-Pacific region.

Founded in April 2024 and registered with the Office of the Company Registrar under the Government of Nepal, we operate across seven active business verticals — from civil infrastructure consulting to electronics trade, civil machinery import/export, and our strategic focus on AI and robotics for the Japanese market.

Our founding team brings together construction professionals, business strategists, and technology visionaries united by one goal: to build strong foundations that create lasting impact for communities and industries across Asia-Pacific.

Work With Us
Our Foundation

Strong Foundations.
Lasting Impact.

⬡

Integrity

We hold ourselves to the highest ethical standards in every project, partnership, and decision. Transparency is not optional — it is our baseline.

◈

Quality

From detailed project reports to construction supervision, we build with precision and pride. Every deliverable reflects our uncompromising commitment to excellence.

◎

Commitment

We deliver on our promises — to clients, communities, and partners. Our word is our contract, and our results are our reputation.

◇

Innovation

We look beyond traditional methods to embrace technology, AI, and automation — particularly in the construction and infrastructure sectors of Asia-Pacific.

○

Partnership

We believe in building long-term relationships through joint ventures, technology transfers, and cross-border trade agreements that create shared value.

□

Impact

Every road built, every system deployed, every trade partnership formed has the power to transform communities. We take that responsibility seriously.

What We offer

One Platform.
One Network. One Industry.

Our Mission is To transform a fragmented industry into a connected, transparent, and technology-driven ecosystem where every stakeholder can collaborate, innovate, and succeed and To become the global infrastructure powering the future of construction.
01
Registered · Active
🏢 Real Estate & Property Development
Connect landowners, developers, and property managers to streamline acquisition, zoning, design, and development processes. RISI brings transparency and efficiency to every stage of real estate lifecycles.
02
Registered · Active
🏦 Banking, Mortgage & Project Financing
Integrate financial institutions, mortgage providers, and investors to accelerate project funding. RISI simplifies financing workflows, risk assessment, and capital deployment for construction projects.
03
Registered · Active
🏗️ Construction & Infrastructure Development
Enable contractors, engineers, and project owners to coordinate large-scale infrastructure and building projects with real-time collaboration, resource tracking, and progress monitoring.
04
Registered · Active
🏭 Steel, Manufacturing & Building Materials
Bridge steel producers, manufacturers, and material suppliers with construction teams to ensure timely delivery, quality control, and cost optimization of essential building materials.
05
Registered · Active
🏠 Prefabricated & Modular Construction
Support the growing shift toward off-site construction by connecting prefabrication manufacturers with builders, enabling faster assembly, reduced waste, and higher precision.
06
Registered · Active
👷 Contractors & Workforce Management
Provide tools for hiring, scheduling, safety compliance, and performance tracking for construction workforce. RISI helps contractors manage teams efficiently while ensuring worker safety and productivity.
07
Future Focus · Exploring
📈 Investors & Project Ownerss
Offer investors and project owners real-time visibility into project performance, financial health, and risk metrics. RISI empowers data-driven decision-making throughout the investment lifecycle
Construction AIRoboticsConTech SaaSWorkforce PlatformDigital WorkflowsJapan / Asia-Pacific
What We offer

One Platform.
One Network. One Industry.

All verticals are registered and active under the Office of the Company Registrar, Nepal — with AI & Robotics as our core strategic direction for Japan and Asia-Pacific.
08
Registered · Active
🚚 Vendors, Suppliers & Procurement
Create a streamlined procurement network where vendors and suppliers can bid, deliver, and manage materials digitally. Reduce delays, cut costs, and improve supply chain transparency.
09
Registered · Active
🤖 AI-Powered Construction Intelligence
Leverage artificial intelligence to analyze project data, predict risks, optimize schedules, and automate routine tasks. RISI’s AI engine delivers actionable insights that drive smarter construction outcomes.
10
Registered · Active
🌏 Global Construction Marketplace
Access a worldwide network of construction professionals, suppliers, and service providers. RISI’s marketplace connects local projects with global expertise, materials, and innovation.

Geographic Reach

Nepal to
Asia-Pacific.

Established · HQ
Nepal
Headquarters and legal entity. All seven business verticals active. PAN registered with IRD. Primary operations base for construction, infrastructure, and trade.
Exploring
Japan
Fukuoka Startup Visa track. ConTech SaaS and SSW skilled workforce platform. Founder based in Japan, driving our AI and robotics strategic direction for the Asia-Pacific market.
Exploring
India
Trade partnerships, technology collaboration, and construction consulting. A strategic South Asia hub connecting Nepal's operations to broader regional opportunity.
Exploring
China
Machinery sourcing, electronics procurement, and AI & Robotics technology partnerships. Primary supply chain partner for civil machinery and technology hardware import.
Vision
Asia-Pacific — Long-term regional scale · ConTech platform deployment · Infrastructure consulting network
Join the Team

Grow With
Risi.

We are a young, ambitious company building something meaningful across Asia-Pacific. We look for people who share our commitment to excellence, integrity, and building things that last.

Whether you're a seasoned professional or just starting your career, if you're driven by purpose and want to work at the intersection of construction, technology, and international trade — we want to hear from you.
